archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy / E-commerce Context) + BookMyShow Brand DNA

buttons.primary: bg-[#F84464] hover:bg-[#E03C5A] text-white rounded-lg font-bold transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-border text-text_primary hover:border-primary hover:text-primary rounded-lg font-bold transition-all

cards.movie: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-surface border border-border shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300
cards.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border transition-colors duration-300

seat_selection.seat_button: w-8 h-8 sm:w-10 sm:h-10 rounded-t-lg rounded-b-sm flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-semibold transition-all duration-200 border
seat_selection.screen: w-full max-w-3xl h-12 sm:h-20 mx-auto rounded-[50%] border-t-4 border-primary/50 shadow-[0_-20px_50px_rgba(248,68,100,0.1)] mb-12 sm:mb-24

backgrounds.description: Empty Theater Screen Background for Hero Section

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a robust Dark/Light mode toggle in the main layout.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away heavy borders; prefer clean, minimalistic cards with subtle shadows.
The Home page should feature a Hero section with a dark cinematic background image and a 'Now Showing' movie grid.
Seat Selection UI MUST be interactive. Map out a grid (e.g., 10x10) representing a theatre layout. Use a curved line/div at the top to represent the screen.
Seats should have 3 states: Available (border only), Selected (Solid Primary Red), Booked (Solid Grey, disabled).
Integrate a floating AI Chatbot button (bottom-right) that opens a sleek chat dialog. Use the ai_avatar image provided for the bot.
Use standard React context or a lightweight store (Zustand) for the booking flow state (movie -> date -> seats -> checkout).
Filters (Date, Genre, Language) should be placed either as a sticky left sidebar or horizontal pill scrollbar below the header.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="movie-card-1"`, `data-testid="seat-A1"`).
For the PDF ticket, generate a clean, printable UI view that can be downloaded (use standard browser print functionality or a library like html2canvas/jspdf).
